leadText: Mount Hokulani (Japanese: ホクラニ岳(だけ) Mount Hokulani) is the second-tallest mountain in Alola, located on Ula'ula Island. The Exeggutor Express takes passengers from the mountain's base on Route 10 to the summit, where the Hokulani Observatory is located.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Mount Hokulani features a long asphalt road leading up and down the mountainside. Along the road are several cliffs with tall grass . At the summit, there's a parking lot and an empty spot of land, along with two buildings: a Pokémon Center and the Hokulani Observatory .
